spec.purpose: Small 110x104 rounded square meta tile (icon over label) used in the course-hero. Repeats 4x in hero (Sat & Sun / Studio / 4:00 PM – 6:00 PM / English).

acceptance: Component is a named export rendering a <div> with icon slot + label
Uses tokens from DESIGN.md (bg-surface-1, border-border-1, rounded-lg, text-text-secondary); no arbitrary hex/px literals
Renders without horizontal scroll at viewport widths 1920 / 1280 / 768 / 375
Accepts arbitrary icon ReactNode in a fixed-size top slot

spec.purpose: Highlight tile (~641x155) with a 52x52 rounded brand-lite icon badge + title + body. Composition wrapper over existing Card primitive, no Card.tsx variant change required.

acceptance: Composes existing Card primitive; does NOT modify card.tsx
Renders icon in a 52x52 rounded-square tile with bg-brand-lite / text-text-brand
Title uses text-h5 token, body uses text-subtext-1 with text-text-secondary
Uses tokens from DESIGN.md only; no arbitrary hex/px literals
Renders without horizontal scroll at viewport widths 1920 / 1280 / 768 / 375

spec.purpose: Compact 294x148 title+body card used inside the curriculum carousel.
imports: Card or pure div + cn from @/lib/utils

acceptance: Renders a fixed-width card (responsive: stays a single card lane, not fluid-stretch)
Title uses text-h5, body uses text-subtext-1 with text-text-tertiary
Uses tokens from DESIGN.md only; no arbitrary hex/px literals
Renders without horizontal scroll at viewport widths 1920 / 1280 / 768 / 375 when placed in overflow-x-auto parent

spec.purpose: Shared 46x46 circular brand-primary nav button with up-right arrow. Imported by both curriculum-section AND instructors-section.

acceptance: Renders as <a> when href is provided, <button> otherwise
Circular (rounded-full), brand-primary background, text-text-inverse icon color
ariaLabel prop is required and applied to the rendered element
Uses tokens from DESIGN.md only; no arbitrary hex/px literals
Renders without horizontal scroll at viewport widths 1920 / 1280 / 768 / 375

spec.purpose: 98x98 avatar (left) + name + role (right) card used in instructors-section.

Uses tokens from DESIGN.md only; no arbitrary hex/px literals
Renders without horizontal scroll at viewport widths 1920 / 1280 / 768 / 375

spec.purpose: Minimal disclosure pattern (question + '+/–' toggle, expandable answer). No Accordion exists in repo — build a tiny controlled-state component. Uses HorizontalBorder row layout from Figma.

acceptance: Client component ('use client') with internal open/close state seeded from defaultOpen
Question button toggles the answer panel; +/− icon swaps on open/close
When answer prop is empty, panel collapses to nothing (no empty-panel render)
Uses tokens from DESIGN.md only; no arbitrary hex/px literals
Renders without horizontal scroll at viewport widths 1920 / 1280 / 768 / 375
Keyboard accessible: button focusable, aria-expanded reflects state

spec.purpose: Add a tiny optional `instructor` prop to ProgramCard so popular-courses can show 'JD · Janardhan Durga Prasad' inside each card without duplicating the component.

props.name: instructor
props.type: { name: string; avatar?: string; initials?: string } | undefined

acceptance: Existing ProgramCard call sites (homepage programs grid) continue to work without changes — instructor prop is fully optional
When instructor prop is provided, render avatar circle (or initials fallback) + name in the dashed footer area, before the CTA
When instructor prop is omitted, layout is identical to the pre-change baseline
Uses tokens from DESIGN.md only; no arbitrary hex/px literals
Renders without horizontal scroll at viewport widths 1920 / 1280 / 768 / 375
tasks.notes: Additive prop only — do not break the existing prop contract. One-task extension preferred over duplicating ProgramCard.

spec.purpose: 3-card row above the site-footer: 'Free Trial Session' / 'Speak to us' / 'Take a Guided Path'. Each card has title + body + 154x46 brand-primary button.

props.name: items
props.type: Array<{ title: string; body: string; ctaLabel: string; ctaHref: string }>

acceptance: Renders a 3-column grid at >=lg, stacks gracefully on smaller viewports
Each card uses bg-surface-1 / border-border-1 / rounded-lg
CTA uses bg-brand-primary / text-text-inverse
Uses tokens from DESIGN.md only; no arbitrary hex/px literals
Renders without horizontal scroll at viewport widths 1920 / 1280 / 768 / 375

spec.purpose: Course landing hero: breadcrumb, course title 'Aerial Yoga Course', tagline, 4 CourseMetaChip meta tiles, primary CTA, hero image on the right (dark rounded card).

acceptance: Two-column layout (text left, dark-card hero image right) at >=lg; stacks on smaller viewports
Renders 4 CourseMetaChip instances in a row from the meta prop
Title uses text-h2 token, subtitle uses text-subtext-2 with text-text-secondary
CTA button uses bg-brand-primary / text-text-inverse
Uses tokens from DESIGN.md only; no arbitrary hex/px literals
Icon string in meta is mapped to a lucide-react icon component (calendar/location/clock/globe)
Renders without horizontal scroll at viewport widths 1920 / 1280 / 768 / 375

spec.purpose: Sticky in-page nav strip linking to anchor sections. Active item rendered as a pill (bg-brand-primary / text-text-inverse); others are plain text links.

props.name: items
props.type: Array<{ label: string; href: string; active?: boolean }>

acceptance: Renders a horizontal nav with all items; active item gets pill styling (rounded-full / bg-brand-primary / text-text-inverse)
Uses tokens from DESIGN.md only; no arbitrary hex/px literals
Builder should correct the 'Circulum' Figma typo to 'Curriculum' in default content (flagged in decomposer 'uncertain')

Renders without horizontal scroll at viewport widths 1920 / 1280 / 768 / 375 (use overflow-x-auto if needed to allow horizontal scroll WITHIN the nav strip on small viewports while the page itself does not scroll)

spec.purpose: Overview section: eyebrow 'Overview', heading 'Elevate Your Practice — Literally', two body paragraphs (max-width ~880).

acceptance: Eyebrow uses text-mini uppercase tracking-widest pattern
Heading uses text-h2 token
Body paragraphs constrained to max-width ~880 (e.g. max-w-3xl or equivalent Tailwind utility — no arbitrary px)
Uses tokens from DESIGN.md only; no arbitrary hex/px literals
Renders without horizontal scroll at viewport widths 1920 / 1280 / 768 / 375

spec.purpose: Highlights section: eyebrow 'Highlights' + heading 'What You'll Gain' + 2-col x 3-row grid of 6 HighlightCard.

props.name: items

imports: lucide-react icons mapped via local icon resolver
assets: yoga / align-center / strength / leaf / technology / people icons (lucide-react equivalents)

acceptance: Renders eyebrow + heading + a 2-column grid of HighlightCard at >=lg, collapses to 1 column on smaller viewports

Heading uses text-h2 token, eyebrow uses text-mini uppercase

Uses tokens from DESIGN.md only; no arbitrary hex/px literals

spec.purpose: Single demo route that renders the full Yoga Teacher Training Courses page by composing SiteHeader + all 9 course sections + NextStepsCtaGrid + FooterBrandCta + SiteFooter. Uses content from 02_decomposition_courses.json.

acceptance: Page is at apps/web/src/app/demo/courses/page.tsx and renders at /demo/courses

Composes SiteHeader (from components/site-header.tsx, NOT components/layout/header.tsx) + all 9 sections + SiteFooter (from components/site-footer.tsx, NOT components/layout/footer.tsx) in the section order from 02_decomposition_courses.json
Section content (titles, body, items, images) is pulled from 02_decomposition_courses.json props — no fresh copywriting
Renders without horizontal scroll at viewport widths 1920 / 1280 / 768 / 375
Uses tokens from DESIGN.md only at the page-composition level (no arbitrary hex/px literals in the page wrapper)
tasks.notes: ALL section tasks (T9–T19) are listed as depends_on. SiteHeader (T-skip) and SiteFooter (T-skip) are reuse-as-is, imported directly here. Per scout warning: builders must import from components/site-header.tsx and components/site-footer.tsx, NOT components/layout/*.

demo_page.purpose: Renders the full Yoga Teacher Training Courses page (Figma node 1:7667) by composing SiteHeader + 9 sections + SiteFooter using content from _workspace/02_decomposition_courses.json. This is the single page output per the user's pacing — no per-section demo routes.
